reasoning_steps: Rewrote script into Store/View/Yaml/Validate(shell)/Persist(shell)/Platform/UI namespaces per ARCHITECTURE.md
Normalized coords made canonical; px derived at render via View._px against runtime Images map
Polygons keyed per-camera (default pseudo-camera); ids via crypto.randomUUID
Platform.copyText uses navigator.clipboard with execCommand fallback; switchTab takes explicit element
migrateV1 provided for v0.1 in-memory shape mapping; esc() added for HTML injection safety in list rendering
Documented deviation: v0.1 alert() on <3 points removed without replacement until spec 02 inline warnings land
AC1 parity: all v0.1 workflows present and routed through Store actions (static walkthrough)
AC2: points store only normalized x,y; render derives pixels — re-render at any scale stable
AC3: grep confirms no workspace mutation outside Store; render/YAML via subscribe only
AC4: migrateV1 maps mode/object_mask to type/object_filter_mask with ids under default camera
AC5: node --check passes; no network references in file
Known gap accepted: <3-point feedback silent until spec 02 (documented in DevCrew entry)
Evaluated AC1-AC5: SATISFIED (AC1 with documented deviation on alert removal, accepted as spec-02 forward dependency)
Locked decisions D2 (normalized canonical) and D3 partial (alerts removed) honored
Validate namespace: NAME_RE, polygonName (zone-only blocking), polygon (min-points error, range warn), cameraName (required/regex/unique)
Inline field errors (#nameError,#drawError,#camNameError,#camInputError) + warn banner above YAML panel
Single-slot Toast with 5s undo; deleteItem/clearAll/deleteCamera routed through snapshot-undo
Zero alert()/confirm() in file; live-clear of name error on valid input (oq_001 on-commit+live-clear)
AC1-2: zone name rules block commit inline; camera-name collision blocked
AC3: <3 points inline warning, draft preserved
AC4: range check warn-only banner via renderRangeBanner
AC5: undo restores by id at original index
AC6: warning elements hidden when clean (CSS .visible gating)
grep alert(/confirm( = 0
document paste listener, editor-panel + input-focus guards, first image/* item wins
Blob routed through Platform.readImageFile → Store.setImage (single decode path)
Image-replace undo toast via Store.snapshotImage/restoreImage; drop-zone hint mentions Ctrl+V
AC1: same Store.setImage path as upload
AC2: non-image paste no-ops silently
AC3: INPUT/TEXTAREA focus passes text paste through
AC4: polygons survive image replace (normalized coords); undo restores previous image
Persist namespace sole localStorage owner: key fph.workspace.v2, 500ms debounced save, schemaVersion-gated load, clear
Quota/exception → one-time toast, app continues unpersisted; corrupt JSON → discard, fresh start
Restore-on-load hydrates state incl. draft (oq_001); placeholder shows re-upload prompt with filename+dims
Clear All Data button: instant reset + 5s undo via full-state snapshot
AC1: full workspace restored, YAML regenerates from state
AC2: re-upload prompt names file and dims
AC3: debounced save on every notify; no data:image in stored JSON (images live only in runtime Images map)
AC4: Clear All Data wipes key + resets, undo restores
AC5: schemaVersion gate + try/catch → no crash on corrupt storage
Hit-testing: vertexAt (8px display, z-order priority), edgeAt (6px, point-to-segment), display-scale converted
Pointer state machine on mousedown/move/up replaces click handler; draft add only on true click (movement threshold)
Store drag actions with clamp01 bounds + single-step move undo; insertPoint on edge + immediate drag; dblclick vertex delete (min 3 inline warning)
rAF-throttled dragTo → live canvas+YAML; keyboard: Ctrl+Z draft-point/move undo, Escape clear-draft/cancel-drag, Enter close (focus-guarded)
Cursor affordances: grab over vertex, copy over edge, crosshair default
AC1: grab cursor + live drag + live YAML via notify-render
AC2: edge click inserts vertex, immediately draggable
AC3: endDrag commits, Persist debounce absorbs write frequency
AC4: shortcut matrix implemented with focus guard
AC5: Ctrl+Z after release reverts via _lastMove
AC6: dblclick delete guarded at 3 points with inline warning
Edge cases: clamp at bounds, Escape cancels drag, vertex-priority over edge
Vendored js-yaml 4.1.0 (39.4KB, MIT) inline with provenance comment; parse-only per locked D1
Importer.parse: full-config + snippet shapes, string and list coordinate forms, per-polygon pixel-space classification (>1.001), camera settings extraction (ffmpeg/detect/objects.track)
Store.applyImport: merge with rename-on-collision, pixel→normalized conversion using camera image dims, per-polygon skip with warnings, all-or-nothing on hard parse failure
Import UI: collapsible card with textarea, .yml file picker, inline error, warnings list
Browser-verified: full config import created back_yard camera with input/detect/roles/track settings and routed polygons per-camera
Pixel-space mask 100,10,180,10,180,60 on 200×100 image converted to 0.5,0.1,0.9,0.1,0.9,0.6 with conversion note
List-form zone coordinates parsed; name collision driveway→driveway_2 reported
Garbage input rejected with inline error and state deep-equal unchanged (all-or-nothing)
AC1-AC6 evaluated against live browser run: SATISFIED
Note: multi-camera apply (spec 08 T5) shipped in same run, superseding the single-camera picker AC4 path as specified
'all objects' selector option; expansion at YAML emission across trackedObjects (or 6 defaults) with '# from "all objects" mask' comment
Camera Builder optional Tracked Objects multi-select → camera.trackedObjects (empty = null = unknown)
Validate.objectMaskTracked warn-only rule surfaced via #drawWarn on close; objects.track emitted in full-config scope only
Browser-verified: 'all' mask expanded only to tracked type (person) with comment; coexists with specific car mask
Track warning fired for untracked car mask ('camera does not track car'), polygon still committed
No warning when trackedObjects unknown
Camera tab strip rendered from state (default pseudo-tab when populated, '+ Camera' jumps to builder)
Store.setActiveCamera parks/restores per-camera drafts (draftsByCamera, schemaVersion 3); Persist v2→v3 migration
YAML scope toggle: 'This camera' polygons-only snippet vs 'All cameras' full config with nested zones/motion/objects + track; orphaned default items noted in output comment
Assign-to-camera select on default-tab items via Store.movePolygon; camera delete undo restores camera+polygons+meta atomically (from spec 02 toast)
Browser-verified: zero cross-camera leakage — per-camera polygon counts, canvas, item list, YAML all switch correctly
Full-config export for 2-camera workspace structurally valid (ffmpeg/detect/objects.track/filters/zones nested)
Refresh restore: cameras, per-camera polygons, active tab, re-upload prompt, draft mode sync all intact; schemaVersion 3 in storage; no image bytes persisted
Zero console errors/warnings across all scenarios
AC1-AC6 evaluated: SATISFIED (AC6 multi-camera import verified live)
v0.2 exit criteria from master spec: all six confirmed in browser run
Final files_hash recorded; run closed
Consolidated v0.3 (Electron shell + file I/O + ffmpeg grab) and Dinghy rebrand into one 8-point spec — single IPC surface, ships atomically
oq_001 resolved to system ffmpeg per recommended default; user pre-approved by 'continue with v0.3'
T1 rebrand: git mv frigate_config_builder.html→dinghy.html (history preserved), title/header/logo with onerror fallback, serve.js updated

T2 scaffold: package.json (electron ^33, electron-builder ^25), src/main.js (BrowserWindow contextIsolation+sandbox, menu with accelerators, config:open/config:save dialogs with remembered path, frame:grab via spawn argv with 15s timeout, credential sanitizer, pending-grab kill on close), src/preload.js 4-method contextBridge, electron-builder.yml, build/icon.png from dinghy.png 1024px
T3 renderer: guarded Grab Frame button (visible only with dinghyNative + rtsp input on active camera), UI.grabFrame/openConfigNative/saveConfigNative reusing Importer/Yaml/Toast, menu wiring block
Save model: writes generated Yaml.fullConfig; in-place merge explicitly deferred per spec constraint
node --check passes on main.js, preload.js, and extracted renderer script
Browser parity (AC6): title 'Dinghy', logo renders, tagline shown; grabFrameBtn hidden, dinghyNative absent; v0.2 workspace restored from storage; draw/close/delete/undo verified live
Electron smoke (AC1 partial): npx electron . launched, main process alive 8s, clean kill — window/preload/renderer load without crash on electron 33.4.11
Security review: contextIsolation:true, nodeIntegration:false, sandbox:true, URL as argv never shell-interpolated, credentials stripped from error text, no network calls in main
ffmpeg-missing path reviewed (machine lacks ffmpeg; spawn 'error' event → structured {error} with install hint)
AC4 real RTSP grab and AC7 npm run dist deferred to Human T5 per spec
AC1-AC3, AC5, AC6 SATISFIED via static + live verification; AC4, AC7 UNTESTED pending Human T5 (real camera + packaging on user machine)
No drift: constraints honored incl. browser-parity guard and save-as-generated-config scope
